blocks.text: Front door latch removal
Glass should be raised.
1. Front door lining removal
2. Front door hole seal removal

Remove the plug cap (A). Disconnect the coupler (B). Remove the harness clip (C). Remove the front door hole seal (D) as required. If the front door hall seal is damaged or torn, replace it with a new front door hall seal.
3. Front door inner handle removal
Remove the front door inner handle (A) from the door panel.
Remove the clip (B) of the lock cable (A) from the door panel. Remove the inner handle cable (C) from the clip.
Turn and remove the cable fastener (B) on the front door inner handle (A).
Disconnect the lock cable (A) and inner handle cable (B). Inspect cable outer casing ends for damage, bleaching, and replace cable if necessary.
4. Front door center lower sash removal
Remove the glass run channel (A) from the front door center lower sash (B) as required. Remove the front door center lower sash.
Turn and remove the joint bushing (A) and use a clip remover to disconnect the outer handle rod (B).
Turn and remove the joint bushing (A) and disconnect the key cylinder rod (B).
5. Front door latch removal
Remove the bolt using a Torx (T-30). Remove the front door latch (A).
6. Remove the front door lock cable and inner handle cable.
Disconnect the lock cable (A) and inner handle cable (B).
7. Installation Precautions

Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure. Inspect the outer casing terminals of the front door inner handle cable and front door latch cable for damage and bleaching, and replace the cables if necessary.
